title: What's New - VinUni Policy
content:
## What's New

TABLE OF CONTENTS

## New Policies

VinUni reviews its policies to meet the needs of our community, address sector requirements and reflect the current regulatory environment. The following policies have recently been published as new or amended policies.

Policy title

Updated Date

Description

Visiting Scholar Policy (*)

Jun 03, 2026

First release

IT Incident and Service Request Management Procedure (*)

May 21, 2026

This document is published by VSF.

Oversea Travel Policy (*)

May 15, 2026

These regulations govern the approval and management of international business trips by VinUniversity faculty, researchers and staff that are funded by the University or fully/partly sponsored by external partners, to ensure that each trip has clear academic or strategic value and aligns with VinUniversity's objective.

Vietnamese Language Program Guidelines For International Students

May 04, 2026

Second release

English Language Requirements For Undergraduate Admissions

Apr 15, 2026

(*) Internal documents which require VinUni SharePoint (for staff and faculty) access

## Accreditation & Quality Assurance Newsletter

Accreditation & Quality Assurance is a newsletter published by the Accreditation & Quality Assurance (AQA) Unit. The newsletter is published quarterly and provides readers with information and updates on institutional and program accreditation and academic quality assurance. We welcome ideas for articles in future issues, so please contact the AQA Unit by e-mail at [email protected] if you have ideas or submissions for sharing.

See the current issue, which includes guidance, information, and updates on the Accreditation & Quality Assurance Newsletter (Special Edition, February 2025) .

Previous issues of Accreditation, Quality Assurance, and Compliance are archived below:

### 2024

- Volume 8, June 2024 (PDF)

- Volume 7, March 2024 (PDF)

### 2023

- Volume 6, December 2023 (PDF)

- Volume 5, Setember 2023 (PDF)

- Volume 4, June 2023 (PDF)

- Volume 3, March 2023 (PDF)

### 2022

- Volume 2, December 2022 (PDF)

- Volume 1, September 2022 (PDF)

## FAQs

All rules, policies, procedures and guidelines are listed on the Finding Policies page in alphabetical order, by title, categories, and users. Or you can use search engine on the top right of the page, by:

- Full Text (i.e. words contained anywhere within the database or the documents themselves)

- Policy Categories (lists documents based on one of the nine categories)

- Policy By Users (lists documents based on who they apply to – i.e. students or faculty and staff)

You can search using one field or a combination of multiple fields.

You have several options for assistance with interpreting or understanding a policy. You can go to:

- Your line manager (if you are a faculty member or staff), or your academic advisor (if you are a student)

- The responsible office that developed/issued the specific policy

- Governance Support Unit

Each policy is issued or developed by a specific office. You can find the responsible office by clicking on a policy within the Finding Policies page, where it is listed in the policy’s Policy Status tab.
